notes: Candidate over-hedges and fails to integrate contradictions; bearish thesis collapses into bullet salad.
baseline_text: AAPL Greater China revenue -8% YoY (sec_filings). FX headwinds -2.5% YoY (sec_filings). P/E 28.5 vs 5y mean 24.1 (yahoo). Services growth decelerating to +12% (sec_filings) from +18%.
candidate_text: AAPL may or may not face China weakness. Maybe FX is a headwind, hard to say. P/E could be elevated. Services might decelerate. Many factors to consider. No clear verdict. Could go either way.
